Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 2000000
Send ID 73D
Receive ID 73E
Functional Addr 63
Functional Name SOW Rear Left
